channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, June 9, 2026
item.description: Two macro forces are colliding this week that hit Midya's work directly: Apple's belated Siri overhaul — arriving just as rivals sprint past chatbots into full agentic AI — reframes what 'AI in marketing' actually means for consulting pitches, because the client conversation is n...
